session_management.invalidation: On password change or explicit logout from all devices
session_management.device_tracking: Store device fingerprint for security alerts

authorization.player_data_access: Players can only access their own data
authorization.admin_access: Separate admin role with elevated policies

data_protection.pii_handling: Minimize collection - only email required, display_name optional

gdpr_compliance.data_portability: Export all player data on request

cheat_prevention.client_trust: NEVER trust client for critical calculations
server_validation: Purchase transactions atomic (check balance, deduct, grant item)
Battle results verified against battle seed

incident_response.escalation: Email alerts for auth anomalies, rate limit breaches
incident_response.recovery: Database point-in-time recovery (Supabase Pro feature, consider for launch)
